title: JD Vance heads to Hungary to support Viktor Orbán ahead of high-stakes election
summary_full: Viktor Orbán has said the EU is a greater threat to Hungary than Russia. As an election defeat looms, U.S. Vice President JD Vance is visiting to support him.
summary_public: Viktor Orbán has said the EU is a greater threat to Hungary than Russia. As an election defeat looms, U.S. Vice President JD Vance is visiting to support him.

HU.label: negative
HU.evidence: EU is a greater threat to Hungary than Russia
